rules.name: Layered route orchestration
rules.description: Routes read HTTP input, delegate request parsing, call services, and return mapped responses. Routes must not construct repositories or manually map JSON fields to domain objects.

rules.name: Strict external camelCase contract
rules.description: JSON/API fields must be canonical camelCase only. Transitional aliases such as id/name beside taskId/taskName are not allowed.

rules.name: Python snake_case internals
rules.description: Python dataclass attributes, service parameters, repository parameters, and internal variables use snake_case.

rules.name: Repository protocol dependency
rules.description: Services depend on repository protocols, not concrete repository implementations.

rules.name: Database provider protocol dependency
rules.description: Concrete repositories depend on a database connection provider protocol, not a concrete database manager class.

rules.name: Split validation
rules.description: API payload validation happens before request/domain mapping; domain and lookup validation happens before repository operations.

rules.name: Lookup/reference data
rules.description: Statuses, categories, types, and similar reference values are loaded through reference tables/providers and exposed through reference-data APIs.

rules.name: Focused slice tests
rules.description: Each generated slice includes focused tests for API contracts, mappers, validators, service behavior with fake repositories, and repository protocol expectations.
